input_text: Checkout stopped working at 2026-06-16T10:14:00Z. Severity is critical and about 500 users are affected. SRE is investigating.

expected_output.title: Checkout stopped working
expected_output.description: Checkout stopped working and prevented about 500 users from completing the workflow.

input_text: Search latency increased in production at 2026-06-16T11:05:00Z. Impact is low, no users are blocked, and the incident is still open.

expected_output.title: Search latency increased
expected_output.description: Search latency increased in production, but no users are blocked by the incident.

input_text: Payments API returned 500 errors from 2026-06-16T09:20:00Z. Severity high. 220 users could not complete purchases. Payments team is investigating.

expected_output.title: Payments API returned 500 errors
expected_output.description: Payments API returned 500 errors and prevented 220 users from completing purchases.

input_text: Authentication callbacks intermittently failed around 2026-06-16T12:45:00Z. Medium severity, about 35 users affected, status investigating.

expected_output.title: Authentication callbacks failed intermittently
expected_output.description: Authentication callbacks intermittently failed and affected about 35 users.

input_text: Inventory cache served stale stock counts at 2026-06-16T13:30:00Z. Medium severity. No users were blocked. The issue was resolved after cache invalidation.

expected_output.title: Inventory cache served stale stock counts
expected_output.description: Inventory cache served stale stock counts, but no users were blocked.

input_text: Email notifications were delayed starting 2026-06-16T14:10:00Z. Low severity. 1200 users received late notifications and the incident remains open.

expected_output.title: Email notifications were delayed
expected_output.description: Email notifications were delayed and 1200 users received notifications late.

input_text: Primary database failover started at 2026-06-16T15:02:00Z after the primary node became unreachable. Critical severity. 3200 users saw checkout errors. SRE is investigating.

expected_output.title: Primary database failover started
expected_output.description: Primary database failover started after the primary node became unreachable and users saw checkout errors.

input_text: Feature flag service timed out at 2026-06-16T16:18:00Z and blocked rollout checks. High severity, 80 internal users affected. Restarting the service resolved it.

expected_output.title: Feature flag service timed out
expected_output.description: Feature flag service timed out and blocked rollout checks for internal users.

input_text: The CDN TLS certificate expired at 2026-06-16T17:40:00Z for storefront traffic. Critical severity. Around 10000 users could not load the site. Certificate renewal resolved the incident.

expected_output.title: CDN TLS certificate expired
expected_output.description: The CDN TLS certificate expired for storefront traffic and users could not load the site.

input_text: Analytics ingestion backlog began at 2026-06-16T18:25:00Z. Low severity. No user-facing impact, affected service analytics, status open.

expected_output.title: Analytics ingestion backlog began
expected_output.description: Analytics ingestion backlog began with no user-facing impact.
